data.biography:
早见沙织（日语：早見 沙織／はやみ さおり Hayami Saori，1991年5月29日—）是日本女性声优、歌手。毕业于早稻田大学，I'm Enterprise所属。东京都出身。身高164cm。

小学4年级的时候知道配音演员的存在，并立志成为配音演员。2004年4月，初中1年级时进入日本播音演技研究所学习。在少年声优班第二年的2006年3月，通过I'm Enterprise的选拔考试。第一次工作是《机械女仆》的Drama CD。之后在2007年透过《桃华月惮》动画出道。幼儿园、小学、初中、高中就读于白百合学园，高中时转入东京都内高中就读。

代表作有《桃华月惮》川壁桃花、《我家有个狐仙大人》蛟、《鹡鸰女神》结、《天降之物》伊卡洛斯、《东之伊甸》森美咲、《爆漫王》亚豆美保、《我的妹妹哪有这么可爱！》新垣绫濑、《只有神知道的世界》白娅·杜·罗德·赫尔梅尼姆、《STAR DRIVER 闪亮的塔科特》扬卷和子、《MM一族》结野岚子、《我们仍未知道那天所看见的花的名字。》鹤见知利子、《机动战士高达AGE》尤琳·路歇尔、《TARI TARI》冲田纱羽、《刀剑神域》幸、《我的青春恋爱物语果然有问题》雪之下雪乃、《请问您今天要来点兔子吗？》青山蓝山、《RDG濒危物种少女》铃原泉水子、《魔法科高中的劣等生》司波深雪、《BUDDY COMPLEX》弓原雏、《众神的恶作剧》草薙结衣、《漫画家与助手》足须沙穗都、《日常系的异能战斗》栉川鸠子、《赤发白雪姬》白雪、《终结的炽天使》柊筱娅、《无彩限的怪灵世界》和泉玲奈、《终末的伊泽塔》菲涅、《风夏》冰无小雪、《宇宙警探élDLIVE》其方美铃、《覆面系NOISE》有栖川仁乃、《BORUTO -火影新世代-》漩涡向日葵、《狂赌之渊》蛇喰梦子、《宝石之国》透绿柱石、《声之形》西宫硝子、《RWBY》Ruby等。
data.name: 早见沙织

data.biography:
Saori Hayami is a Japanese voice actress, singer and narrator. She is represented by the agency I'm Enterprise.] As a singer, she is signed to Warner Bros. Home Entertainment Japan. In 2016, she won the 10th Seiyu Awards for Best Supporting Actress.

Her major voice roles include Yukino Yukinoshita in My Teen Romantic Comedy SNAFU, Ayase Aragaki in Oreimo, Shirayuki in Snow White with the Red Hair, Miyuki Shiba in The Irregular at Magic High School, Shinoa Hiiragi in Seraph of the End, Kotohae Hanami in Witchy PreCure!, Urara Shiraishi in Yamada-kun and the Seven Witches, Yotsugi Ononoki in Monogatari, Aila Jyrkiäinen in Gundam Build Fighters, Wako Agemaki in Star Driver, Shōko Nishimiya in A Silent Voice, Yumeko Jabami in Kakegurui – Compulsive Gambler, Shinobu Kocho in Demon Slayer, and Yor Forger en SPY × FAMILY.
data.name: Saori Hayami

data.biography:
Saori Hayami (早見 沙織, Hayami Saori, nacida el 29 de mayo de 1991) es una actriz de voz (seiyuu), cantante y narradora japonesa de Tokio. Está representada por la agencia I'm Enterprise. Como cantante, tiene contrato con Warner Bros. Home Entertainment Japan. En 2016, ganó el décimo premio Seiyu a la mejor actriz de reparto.

Sus principales papeles de voz incluyen Yukino Yukinoshita en Yahari Ore no Seishun Love Comedy wa Machigatteiru., Ayase Aragaki en Ore no Imouto ga Konna ni Kawaii Wake ga Nai, Shirayuki en La Blancanieves pelirroja, Miyuki Shiba en Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei, Shinoa Hiiragi en Seraph of the end, Kotohae Hanami en Maho Girls Precure!, Urara Shiraishi en Yamada-kun to 7-nin no Majo, Yotsugi Ononoki en Monogatari, Aila Jyrkiäinen en Gundam Build Fighters, Wako Agemaki en Star Driver Kagayaki no Takuto, Shōko Nishimiya en A Silent Voice, Yumeko Jabami en Kakegurui, Shinobu Kocho en Kimetsu no Yaiba y Yor Forger en SPY×FAMILY.
data.name: Saori Hayami

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Yorick van Wageningen (born 16 April 1964 in Baarn) is a Dutch actor.

After acting in several Dutch plays, movies, and television series, van Wageningen was asked to come to Hollywood to appear in Steven Spielberg's Minority Report. Due to problems with his visa, he was unable to work on that movie in the United States. However, he has been acting in American movies ever since. His breakthrough hit was with his role in The Chronicles of Riddick, which earned him much praise by lead actor Vin Diesel. He has starred opposite Amanda Burton, Vin Diesel, Angelina Jolie, Judi Dench, Colin Farrell, Christian Bale, Christopher Plummer and Clive Owen.

After he went to the United States he did not appear in any Dutch film until his return in 2008, starring in Oorlogswinter (Winter in Wartime), based on a famous Dutch children's book about World War II.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Yorick van Wageningen, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Yorick van Wageningen

data.biography:
Yorick van Wageningen (Baarn, 16 april 1964) is een Nederlands acteur.

Biografie

Van Wageningen begon met een aantal kleine rollen in televisieseries als Spijkerhoek en Goede tijden, slechte tijden. In 1995 kreeg hij een prominente rol als Julian in de televisieserie 20 Plus (van Dana Nechushtan), maar vanwege een gebrek aan succes werd de serie na 13 afleveringen geschrapt.

Van Wageningen deed ervaring op in een aantal televisieseries en speelde een paar jaar in het theater. Het succesvolle toneelstuk Total Loss waarin hij speelde werd bewerkt tot een speelfilm, die werd geregisseerd door Dana Nechustan. In Nederland waren de kritieken niet mals en het publiek bleef weg. In Amerika werd de film echter gezien door Steven Spielberg, die zo enthousiast was dat Van Wageningen een grote rol naast Tom Cruise kreeg aangeboden in de film Minority Report. Daarnaast deed Van Wageningen auditie voor de nieuwe film van Joel Schumacher en haalde ook deze rol binnen.

Van Wageningen koos voor Minority Report, maar vlak voor de opnamen werd duidelijk dat er iets niet in orde was met zijn werkvergunning waardoor hij uiteindelijk niet in Spielbergs film kon meespelen. Niet lang erna kreeg Van Wageningen een rol naast Angelina Jolie en Clive Owen in Beyond Borders en sindsdien speelt hij met enige regelmaat in Amerikaanse producties. Hij heeft inmiddels ook gewerkt met Vin Diesel, Judi Dench, Colin Farrell, Christian Bale, Christopher Plummer, Emilio Estevez en Martin Sheen.

Sindsdien is hij niet meer te zien geweest in Nederlandse films, tot hij zijn terugkeer maakte in Oorlogswinter. Van Wageningen speelde een van de hoofdrollen in de verfilming van het gelijknamige boek, namelijk Oom Ben, een landverrader. Deze film zou uiteindelijk bijna een miljoen bezoekers trekken in Nederland en België. Daarna had hij nog een prominente rol in de televisieserie De Troon als koning Willem I.

In 2012 was Van Wageningen te zien in de thriller The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo, waarin hij de curator Nils Bjurman speelt.

Volgens Van Wageningen is hij na een incident van seksueel wangedrag van Job Gosschalk jegens hem, decennialang door diens bedrijf in de ban gedaan, en heeft dit tot een duistere periode in zijn leven geleid, maar is hij er weer bovenop gekomen door in Hollywood aan de bak te komen.
约里克·范·瓦赫宁根（Yorick van Wageningen，1964年4月16日出生于巴恩）是荷兰演员。
data.name: 约里克·范·瓦赫宁根

data.name: 約里克·範·瓦赫寧根

data.biography:
Yorick van Wageningen, 16 Nisan 1964 tarihinde Baarn, Utrecht, Hollanda'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Hollanda tiyatrosunda ve sinemasında sağlam bir temel oluşturduktan sonra Hollywood'a geçiş yapan ve canlandırdığı tekinsiz karakterlerle tanınan yetenekli bir oyuncudur. Kariyerine yerel tiyatro oyunlarında sahne alarak başlayan van Wageningen, sinemadaki ilk deneyimlerini "Wild Mussels" (2000) ve "Total Loss" (2000) gibi Hollanda yapımlarıyla kazandı. Steven Spielberg'in dikkatini çekip "Azınlık Raporu" (Minority Report) filmi için düşünülse de, vize sorunları nedeniyle bu projede yer alamadı; ancak bu süreç Hollywood kapılarının ona açılmasını sağladı.

Uluslararası alandaki ilk büyük çıkışını, Martin Campbell'ın yönettiği ve Angelina Jolie ile Clive Owen'ın başrollerini paylaştığı "Sınırların Ötesinde" (Beyond Borders) (2003) filmiyle gerçekleştirdi. Bu filmdeki performansı, onun Amerikan sinemasında karakter oyuncusu olarak yer edinmesini sağladı. Hemen ertesi yıl, Vin Diesel'in başrolünü üstlendiği bilimkurgu aksiyon filmi "Riddick Günlükleri" (The Chronicles of Riddick) (2004) filminde "The Guv'nor" karakteriyle hafızalara kazındı. Terrence Malick'in yönettiği epik tarih filmi "Yeni Dünya" (The New World) (2005) filminde Captain Argall rolüyle dramatik yeteneğini sergiledi.

Yorick van Wageningen'in kariyerindeki en çok konuşulan ve belki de en zorlu performansı, David Fincher'ın yönettiği "Ejderha Dövmeli Kız" (The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo) (2011) filminde geldi. Rooney Mara'nın canlandırdığı Lisbeth Salander karakterinin yasal vasisi olan sadist avukat Nils Bjurman'ı canlandırdı. İzlemesi son derece zor olan şiddet sahnelerini içeren bu rolü, karakterin karanlık doğası nedeniyle başlangıçta reddetmeyi düşünse de, Fincher'ın vizyonuna güvenerek kabul etti ve filmin en etkileyici performanslarından birini ortaya koydu.

Kariyerine "47 Ronin" (2013) filminde Keanu Reeves ile ve Michael Mann'ın "Blackhat" (2015) filminde Chris Hemsworth ile çalışarak devam etti. 1973 yapımı klasiğin yeniden çevrimi olan "Papillon" (2017) filminde acımasız hapishane müdürü Warden Barrot rolünü üstlendi. 2019 yılında gişe başarısı yakalayan psikolojik korku filmi "Ölümcül Labirent" (Escape Room) filminde Oyun Ustası (Games Master) olarak kilit bir rolde izleyici karşısına çıktı.

Hollywood kariyerinin yanı sıra Hollanda sinemasına da katkı sağlamayı sürdüren oyuncu, II. Dünya Savaşı konulu "De slag om de Schelde" (The Forgotten Battle) (2020) filminde ve Netflix'in fantastik dizisi "The Letter for the King" (2020) yapımında Kral Favian rolüyle yer aldı. Özellikle Hollanda yapımı "Judas" (2019) dizisinde, ülkenin en kötü şöhretli suçlusu Willem Holleeder'ı canlandırdığı performansı ülkesinde büyük övgü topladı ve ona Hollanda'nın en prestijli film ödülü olan Altın Buzağı (Gouden Kalf) ödülünü En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında kazandırdı.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Frank Harper (born 1962) is a British actor and film producer. He is best known for his "Hard Man" roles, such as Billy Bright in The Football Factory (2004), Dog in Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels (1998). He appears as a white nationalist in South West 9, and as the bank robber in Harry Enfield's film Kevin & Perry Go Large. He was featured in The Streets' music video "Fit But You Know It", and cast as real life villain Jack Whomes in Rise of the Foot Soldier. During his career Harper has also appeared on many British TV shows including The Bill, Doctors, Lovejoy and Waking the Dead. Harper is an ardent Millwall F.C. fan.[1] He has admitted to partaking in casual football hooliganism and was interviewed for Cass Pennants book "Terrace Legends"

Description above from the Wikipedia article Frank Harper, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia​
data.name: Frank Harper
Được Làm Hoàng Hậu
data.overview: Dựa trên một truyện tranh nổi tiếng, kể về một cô gái 17 tuổi vẫn hay thích mặc quần thể dục dưới váy, bỗng một ngày trở thành Thái tử phi - người phụ nữ quyền lực thứ 3 của Hàn Quốc. Cô kết hôn với Thái tử đẹp trai nhất Hàn Quốc - Lee Yul, anh chàng làm gục ngã trái tim bao cô gái. Đồng thời cô còn là người tình trong mộng của anh trai thái tử Lee Yul.
